description: Stage4 common experiment: initial load/build, append INSERT batches, reopen after each batch, random point lookup sample, artifact growth tracking.

dataset.notes: Initial persons(id,name,age) dataset. Append cycles grow dataset to one million rows.

workload.notes: For each cycle: append INSERT batch, close/reopen connection, run random point lookup sample.

faultProfile.notes: No fault injection in stage4 common append cycles experiment.
